overview.description: Adventurers encounter many dangerous monsters and nefarious villains. In those moments, combat often breaks out.
overview.organization: Combat is organized into rounds and turns with structured timing and positioning
overview.time_scale: Each round represents about 6 seconds in the game world

components.title: Combat Structure and Initiative
components.description: Core framework for organizing and running combat encounters
contains: Combat step-by-step process (Establish Positions, Roll Initiative, Take Turns)
Initiative system (Dexterity checks, surprise, order determination)
Turn structure (movement, action, communication, object interaction)
Combat ending conditions
Round timing and structure

components.title: Movement and Positioning
components.description: Rules for movement, positioning, and spatial relationships in combat
contains: Basic movement rules and speed deduction
Difficult Terrain (double movement cost)
Grid rules (5-foot squares, diagonal movement, range calculation)
Creature sizes (Tiny to Gargantuan) and space occupation
Moving around other creatures
Breaking up movement and dropping prone

components.title: Attack Mechanics and Combat Actions
components.description: Rules for making attacks, opportunity attacks, and combat-specific actions
contains: Attack structure (Choose Target, Determine Modifiers, Resolve Attack)
Cover system (Half +2 AC, Three-Quarters +5 AC, Total immunity)
Unseen combat (Advantage/Disadvantage for visibility)
Ranged attacks (range penalties, close combat disadvantage)
Melee attacks and reach
Opportunity Attacks (triggers, avoidance, resolution)

components.title: Damage and Healing Systems
components.description: Comprehensive rules for damage, healing, hit points, and character survival
contains: Hit Points and Bloodied condition
Damage rolls and Critical Hits (double dice)
Damage types and Resistance/Vulnerability/Immunity
Healing mechanics and hit point maximum limits
Dropping to 0 HP (death, unconsciousness, massive damage)
Death Saving Throws (3 successes/failures, special rolls)
Stabilizing creatures and knockout rules
Temporary Hit Points (buffer, no stacking, duration)

components.title: Special Combat Situations
components.description: Rules for mounted combat, underwater fighting, and other special scenarios
contains: Mounted Combat (mounting/dismounting, controlling mounts, falling off)
Underwater Combat (weapon impediment, fire resistance)
Environmental combat (darkness, difficult terrain, weather)
Size-based combat and swarm fighting
Magical combat considerations
Vehicle and mass combat scenarios

key_mechanics.initiative: Dexterity check to determine turn order (remains same each round)
key_mechanics.turn_structure: Move (up to Speed) + Action + Bonus Action (if available) + Reaction (any turn)
key_mechanics.attack_resolution: d20 + ability modifier + proficiency bonus vs AC
key_mechanics.critical_hit: Natural 20 = automatic hit + double damage dice
key_mechanics.opportunity_attack: Reaction when creature leaves reach without Disengage
key_mechanics.death_saves: Three successes = stable, three failures = death (DC 10)

cover_summary.half_cover: +2 AC and Dex saves (creature or half-covering object)
cover_summary.three_quarters_cover: +5 AC and Dex saves (three-quarters covering object)
cover_summary.total_cover: Cannot be targeted directly (fully covering object)

movement_summary.difficult_terrain: Costs 2 feet of movement per foot traveled
movement_summary.creature_spaces: Small/Medium (1 square), Large (4 squares), Huge (9 squares), Gargantuan (16 squares)
movement_summary.break_up_movement: Can move before and after actions

standard_actions: Dodge (advantage on Dex saves, attacks have disadvantage)
Help (assist ally or stabilize dying creature)
combat_actions.bonus_actions: Granted by specific class features, spells, or abilities
combat_actions.reactions: Immediate responses to triggers (Opportunity Attacks, Counterspell, etc.)

survival_mechanics.hit_points: Durability and will to live (0 = unconscious or death)
survival_mechanics.bloodied: Half hit points or fewer (no mechanical effect, triggers other abilities)
survival_mechanics.unconscious: 0 HP but not dead, make Death Saving Throws
survival_mechanics.stable: 0 HP but not making death saves, regain 1 HP after 1d4 hours
survival_mechanics.massive_damage: Remaining damage ≥ HP maximum = instant death

special_situations.mounted_combat: Half Speed to mount/dismount, controlled mounts act on your turn
special_situations.underwater: Disadvantage on non-piercing melee attacks, ranged attacks limited
special_situations.unseen_targets: Disadvantage to attack unseen, advantage when unseen by target
special_situations.prone: Disadvantage on attacks, advantage for melee attacks against you

tactical_considerations.positioning: Use cover, control space, coordinate with allies
tactical_considerations.resource_management: Balance spell slots, hit points, and special abilities
